hooks.command: node -e "try{const r=JSON.parse(process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT||'{}');const id=r.id||'<id>';process.stdout.write('VALIDATION REQUIRED: Workflow '+id+' was just created. You MUST call n8n_validate_workflow({ workflowId: \"'+id+'\", profile: \"runtime\" }) NOW before activating. Do not skip.');}catch(e){process.stdout.write('VALIDATION REQUIRED: Workflow created. Run n8n_validate_workflow(workflowId, profile=runtime) before activating.');}"

node -e "try{const r=JSON.parse(process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT||'{}');const errs=(r.errors||[]).length;const warns=(r.warnings||[]).length;if(errs>0){process.stdout.write('LEARNING FLAG: Validation found '+errs+' error(s). After fixing, use the n8n-capture-learning skill to record: which node/field failed, what the root cause was, and the correct config. This grows the knowledge base for future builds.');}else{process.stdout.write('Validation clean ('+warns+' warning(s)). Workflow ready to activate.');}}catch(e){}"

echo "SESSION CHECKPOINT: Before this session ends — did you discover any new node configs, credential keys, error patterns, or workflow patterns? If yes, use the n8n-capture-learning skill to write them to memory now. Even one sentence per finding compounds into a better knowledge base over time."
